name: ds_sftp_erp_source
description: SFTP dataset for Kulcs-Soft ERP monthly GL export. Reads semicolon-delimited CSV files from the SFTP export directory. File name and entity subdirectory are parameterised — the same dataset serves all Kulcs-Soft entity connections. Linked service: ls_sftp_kulcssoft. Remediates FINDING A-02.

entity_code.description: Entity identifier — maps to SFTP sub-directory (e.g. 'ACME_HU'). Must match config.ref_entity_master.entity_code.

period_year.description: Four-digit fiscal year of the export (e.g. 2026).

period_month.description: Numeric month of the export, 1–12 (e.g. 3 for March).

file_name.description: Exact file name on the SFTP share (e.g. 'GL_202603.csv'). ADF pl_erp_extract resolves this from the directory listing before passing it here.

schema.name: debit_amount
schema.description: Tartozik osszeg (HUF, decimal with comma separator)

schema.name: credit_amount
schema.description: Kovetkezik osszeg (HUF, decimal with comma separator)

schema.name: currency_code
schema.description: ISO 4217 currency code (HUF, EUR, USD, etc.)

schema.name: debit_amount_fcy
schema.description: Tartozik osszeg devizaban (FCY amount before conversion)

schema.name: fx_rate
schema.description: MNB arfolyam (NBH rate used for conversion, HUF per 1 FCY unit)

schema.name: cost_centre_code
schema.description: Koltsegkozpont kod (optional; null if not cost-centre tracked)

schema.name: project_code
schema.description: Projekt kod (optional; null if not project-tracked)
